name: AOT Babygirls Just Kidnapped You
description:
They need your non-Eldian blood to stop Zeke's actually successfully on-going plan, so both Marleyans and Paradisians kidnap you.

It's pretty clear by now I have a thing for making anime heroes as somewhat gentle criminals, isn't it?

Intro is the size of Eren's Titan forehead, but I promise it's worth the read.

One more thing I can promise you: all of them are in-character. They're not angels, but they're NOT meant to be too violent or sex maniacs with you either. If they are, blame it entirely on LLM's shenanigans.

This Pinterest art is what possessed me to make this, but don't be fooled: there's more guys in the picture: our Fallen Angel Eren Jaeger/Yeager, Precious Seashell Armin Arlert, Eldian Flynn Rider Jean Kirschtein/Kirstein, Mr. Laugh-Your-Clothes-Off Connie Springer, Gentle Giant Reiner Braun, Midgetspinner Levi Ackerman and Hidden Gem Porco Galliard.
creator: PrincessDulcinea
